Displays a _schematic_ view with _physics data_ on viewed sublevels. Inherits the _Aviator goggle HUD_ while worn.
Marks its _center of mass_ and draws each _force group_ (_lift_, _drag_, _thrust_, _gravity_, etc.) as a colored vector.
commands.schematician.tooltip.sigfigs_of: Force tooltip rounding disabled — showing two decimal places.
commands.schematician.tooltip.sigfigs_se: Force tooltip rounded to %s significant figures (0 = integer precision).
commands.schematician.tooltip.sigfigs_cu: Force tooltip rounding is on at %s significant figures (0 = integer precision).
Force tooltip rounding is off — showing two decimal places.
